sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33938" key="e)mbada=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμ-βᾰδᾶς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾶ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n33938.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cobbler</tr_>, name given to Anytus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
